message:
feat(context): implement relevance scoring for skill auto-loading

Add RelevanceScorer for multi-factor context-aware skill ranking:

WorkingContext struct:
- detected_projects: From ProjectDetector with confidence scores
- recent_files: Recently accessed/modified files
- detected_tools: Tools found in PATH/environment
- content_snippets: For signal pattern matching

RelevanceScorer with configurable weights (default):
- project_type: 0.40 - Strong indicator of relevance
- file_patterns: 0.25 - Specific to current work
- tools: 0.20 - Indicates toolchain
- signals: 0.10 - Advanced regex pattern matching
- historical: 0.05 - Reserved for recommendation engine

Features:
- score(): Single skill scoring against context
- rank(): Score and sort multiple skills
- top_n(): Get N most relevant skills
- above_threshold(): Filter by minimum score
- breakdown(): Detailed component scores for explainability

Matching functions:
- project_type_match: Best confidence from matching detected projects
- file_pattern_match: Ratio of files matching skill patterns
- tool_match: Ratio of skill tools present in environment
- signal_match: Weighted sum of matching regex patterns

17 unit tests covering all scoring scenarios.

Closes: meta_skill-ioqt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
